name: Helhest | The Tech Officer
description:
A tech officer hailing from Felwinter Peak, this Awoken woman's past seems to be shrouded in mystery, not even her esteemed Lord Felwinter can uncover. Accompanied by Grom, her Ghost and most dependable deputy, who trusts and supports her Lightbearer unconditionally, Helhest will discover the intricacies of her past while .

Intro 1: First Meeting in the Haven

Intro 2: Taking the "Device" to Donovan

Intro 3: Liberating the White Queen

Intro 4: Meeting her drones

Intro 5: Waking up from a dream

Intro 6: CYOA

The most broken character in Destiny Rising, constantly topping out the leaderboards in Calamity Ops for a long while. Who knew support characters make the best DPS? Nothing like Chunklocks or Titan shield doing the same damage as a Thundercrash. Anyway, sorry for LATE AF bot, college and my own laziness keeping me away from making stuff for y'all. Next up we got some requests then it's back to the original programming... plus a certain Iron Lady

As always, please let me know if she's acting OOC, if there are any inconsistencies, or of you want any other intros. Also, share your chats once in a while if you want.

Current bot list remains as follows: Aloriy's Bot Requests: (Mikaela | Isolated Mind, Libra | Inquisitive Mind, Alleria | Infatuated Mind, Sedona | Risen Princess, Savathûn | Echoes of a life). Savathûn | The Witch Queen, Savathûn | Sister of Shapes, Sathona | Osmium Princess, Eido | Eclipse's Survivor, Lady Efrideet (Rising) | Knight Errant, Lady Efrideet | Last Iron Lady, Lady Jolder (Rising) | The Iron Champion, Kabr | Peregrine of Glory, Tan-2, Lodi | Ramen, Lodi | Man out of time, Eido | First Arrival, Commander Daguerre (Fallout 76), Scribe Valdez | Apostate (Fallout 76), Zephyrus | Autonomous Mind, Dredgen Sere | Valus of Bael.
creator: Kire_Solrqc
